name: Tamron 70-180mm f/2.8 Di III VXD
description: Flexible zoom range, fast design, and compact profile, the Tamron 70-180mm f/2.8 Di III VXD is a unique take on the ubiquitous and popular telephoto zoom.

features.Key Features:: E-Mount Lens/Full-Frame Format | Aperture Range: f/2.8 to f/22 | Six Low Dispersion Elements | Three Aspherical Elements | BBAR-G2 and Fluorine Coatings | Dual VXD Linear AF Motors | Floating Elements System | Moisture-Resistant Construction | Rounded 9-Blade Diaphragm
